outfit_info.outfit_description: A young adventurer is depicted in a layered, comfortable ensemble suitable for stormy weather. A striped jacket is worn over a blue hoodie and logo tank top, paired with grey Bermuda shorts and green boat shoes, completed by a backpack for a practical and dynamic look.

model_attributes.body: A young boy with a lean build, conveying agility and youthful energy.
model_attributes.pose: Captured mid-stride on a wet wooden dock, clutching a vinyl record, with a determined gaze.
model_attributes.background: A dramatic, stormy harbor scene featuring heavy rain, lightning, dark ships, and turbulent dark water.

outfit.P01003387: white logo printed cotton tank top
outfit.P01057999: grey logo cotton fleece Bermuda shorts
